title: Normalized Tokens
description: Output of figma_primitives parse-tokens. A flat list of design token objects.

figmaName.description: Slash-separated token name matching Figma variable path (e.g. 'color/brand/primary').

cssName.description: Original CSS custom property name (present for css format input only).

twKey.description: Original Tailwind key path (present for tailwind format input only).

sdPath.description: Original Style Dictionary / Tokens Studio dot-path (present for SD/TS format input only).

value.description: Normalized token value (rem converted to px, hex lowercased).

isAlias.description: True if this token's value references another token (var(), {ref}, etc.).

aliasTarget.description: figmaName of the aliased token, or null if not an alias.

description.description: Token description from source file (empty string if not available).

resolvedValue.description: Terminal value after following alias chain (added by resolve-aliases). Null if circular or unresolved.

resolvedChain.description: Ordered list of figmaName hops from this token to the terminal (added by resolve-aliases).

circularAlias.description: True if this token is part of a circular alias chain (added by resolve-aliases).
